caption: A dense forest of slender, leafless trees fills the scene, their brown trunks rising vertically against a clear blue sky. The ground is blanketed in a thick layer of reddish-brown fallen leaves. The camera remains stationary, capturing a static view of the woodland. There are no people, animals, equipment, or text visible in the scene. Throughout the sequence, the lighting and the positions of the trees remain consistent, with only subtle shifts in the shadows and light reflecting off the bark, suggesting a slight movement of light or a very minor camera vibration. The overall atmosphere is one of a quiet, dormant forest during a cold season.
